basic_details.job_title: Rajasthan RSSB Senior and Basic Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026 - 3951 Posts | Apply Online 25 May to 23 June
basic_details.post_name: Senior Computer Instructor & Basic Computer Instructor
basic_details.department: Secondary Education Department & Sanskrit Education Department, Government of Rajasthan
basic_details.job_location: All Districts of Rajasthan (Non-Scheduled & Scheduled Areas)
basic_details.short_information: RSSB Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) recruitment notification 2026 for 3951 Computer Instructor vacancies including 322 Senior Computer Instructor (Pay Level-10) and 3629 Basic Computer Instructor (Pay Level-8) posts under the Secondary Education Department and Sanskrit Education Department, Government of Rajasthan. The online application process starts on 25th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 23rd June 2026 (11:59 PM) via SSO Recruitment Portal. Find RSSB Computer Instructor vacancies on the official website rssb.rajasthan.gov.in. You can a

important_dates.result_date: To be notified on official website

application_fee.details: The One Time Registration (OTR) fee is applicable for registration on the SSO Portal. This is a one-time fee valid for all future RSSB and RSLDC recruitments. Candidates who have already paid OTR fee need not pay again. Candidates from outside Rajasthan are treated as General category regardless of caste and must pay Rs. 600. | Payment Mode: e-Mitra / CSC / Net Banking / ATM Debit Card / Credit Card | Note: The OTR fee is non-refundable but is a one-time registration valid for all future RSSB and RSLDC recruitments.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on 01 January 2027. Age relaxation is available for women, reserved categories, Ex-Servicemen, and PwBD candidates as per Government of Rajasthan norms. For Secondary Education Department posts only, an additional 3 years' relaxation is applicable as no recruitment was held after 2022 (not applicable to Sanskrit Education posts). All age relaxations are non-cumulative. | Important Note: For Secondary Education Department posts only, an additional 3 years' relaxation is applicable as no recruitment was held after 2022. This does not apply to Sanskrit Education posts.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions including educational qualification, working knowledge of Hindi in Devanagari script, and knowledge of Rajasthani culture. Age is calculated as on 01-01-2027. | Post-Wise Educational Qualification:

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be appointed with pay scale as per 7th Pay Commission adopted by Government of Rajasthan. Probation period is 2 years. During probation, fixed remuneration is paid (no regular pay scale, DA, HRA, or TA). After satisfactory completion of probation and confirmation, full pay scale with DA, HRA, TA, NPS, GPF, Gratuity, LTC, and Medical Benefits become applicable. | Probation Period & Benefits: | Probation Period: 2 years During Probation: Fixed remuneration (no regular pay scale, DA, HRA, or TA) After Confirmation: Full pay scale + DA + HRA + TA + NPS + GPF + Gratuity + LTC + Medical Benefits

selection_process: Stage 1 - CBT Merit-based (200 marks) Two papers of 100 marks each. Negative marking of 1/3 per wrong answer. Qualifying: 40% (General), 35% (SC/ST). Normalization applied if conducted in multiple shifts.
Stage 2 - Document Verification Qualifying Candidates shortlisted on merit are called to verify original certificates and documents.
Stage 3 - Medical Examination Qualifying Medical fitness certificate from Chief Medical & Health Officer of the district or Medical Jurist.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Rajasthan SSO Portal (sso.rajasthan.gov.in). No offline applications are accepted under any circumstances. The online portal is active from 25-05-2026 to 23-06-2026 (11:59 PM).
Step 1: Visit SSO Portal - Go to sso.rajasthan.gov.in and log in with your SSO ID
Step 2: Complete OTR (if not registered) - Complete One Time Registration (OTR) - fill category, disability status, and domicile details correctly
important_instructions: Applications are online only - no offline applications accepted under any circumstances Application period: 25-05-2026 to 23-06-2026 (11:59 PM) Age calculated as on 01-01-2027: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 40 years (relaxation as per category) Complete OTR (One Time Registration) on SSO Portal well before last date to avoid transaction pendency issues Correction window: 3 days after application closure (Fee: Rs. 300) Second correction window: 7 days after examination Name, father's name, date of birth, photo, signature, and thumb impression cannot be changed even in correction window CBT Exam: Senior - 22-08-2026, Basic - 23-08-2026 Exam Pattern: 200 marks (Paper I: 100 + Paper II: 100), 4 hours total duration Negative Marking: 1/3 mark per wrong answer Qualifying Marks: 40% for General, 35% for SC/ST OBC certificate must be based on father's name, residence, and income - husband-based OBC certificates not valid EWS income & asset certificate valid for 1 year from issue date (extendable up to 3 years with affidavit) Caste certificates issued by non-competent authorities will be rejected at document verification stage For Secondary Education posts: additional 3 years age relaxation (not for Sanskrit Education) Candidates from outside Rajasthan treated as General category - must pay Rs. 600 OTR fee Probation period: 2 years (fixed remuneration during probation) Use of unfair means will lead to debarment and criminal proceedings under Rajasthan Public Examination (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2022 False information will lead to disqualification and legal action under IPC Section 217 No TA/DA payable for attending CBT exam or document verification Candidates failing to appear in two or more RSSB exams in a financial year may have OTR blocked
